Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x98EC "HELTERSKELTER-3000-98EC" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $3000 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Helter Skelter.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $3000 which: 1. Copies 256 bytes of data from $3020 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400 2. Sets CIA #2 timer A ($DD04 and $DD05) to allow the game to run properly 3. Jumps to the entry point at $98EC (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code)
